displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• For bathroom use
• No scrub formula
• Eliminates stubborn stains & mould
• Kills germs & bacteria • Extra shine

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Directions for use:
1. Turn safety stopper and align with "foam" marking at tip of nozzle with groove in the centre of yellow strip
2. Hold bottle 10cm away from mold stains. Squeeze and release lever to dispense solution
3. Rinse thoroughly with water after a few minutes
4. After use, align the safety stopper tip with "closed" marking. Be sure to wash your hands after use

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool dry place, away fro direct sunlight and heat

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Sodium Hypochlorite, Alkyl Amine Oxide, Sodium Hydroxide

metaData.Key Information:
• Scientifically proven to kill 99.9% of germs including Influenze A (H1N1)
• Removes grease and oil effectively
• Leaves no residue behind
metaData.Preparation:
• Direction for use:
1. Spray, wait until stains disappear and rinse immediately
• On hard surfaces such as glazed ceramic tile:
1. Spray surface until thoroughly wet, let stand 5 minutes and rinse
2. Heavy mildew buildup may require longer contact time
• Where to use: Tubs, Shower Doors, Vinyl Curtains, Toilets, Fiberglass, Plastic, Glazed and Unglazed Ceramics Tiles

metaData.SAP Product Name: SMARTCHOICE SUPERSTRONG STAIN REMOVER 2S 1L

product.name: Smart Choice Bathroom Stain Remover

metaData.Key Information: This mold and mildew disinfectant spray kills common bacteria found in homes, eliminating mold and mildew quickly and effectively and with its Smart Tube™ technology, you are guaranteed to spray every drop. Use this mold and mildew disinfectant spray on hard nonporous surfaces such as glazed and unglazed ceramic tile, tubs, shower doors, counters, sinks and no wax floors. Spray your way to a sparkling clean bathroom with Tilex® that is powered by Clorox Bleach.
metaData.Preparation:
• To Remove Mildew Stains:
1. Turn sprayer nozzle to “ON”
2. Spray and wait until stain disappear and rinse
3. Heavy mildew build up may require longer contact time, or two cleanings
• On Hard, Non-Porous Surfaces (Glazed Ceramic Tile):
1. Turn sprayer nozzle to “ON”
2.Spray surface until thoroughly wet, let stand 5 minutes and rinse to disinfect and kill mold and mildew
• Note:
To spray every drop, tilt bottle at a downward angle while spraying

product.description: FairPrice Glass Cleaner effectively cleans glass surfaces without leaving any dirt, stains, grime or streaks. It provides extra shine and is suitable for car windscreen, mirrors, TV screens, ceramics and other glass surfaces.

metaData.Key Information:
Harpic Liquid Lavender Fresh kills 99.9% of bacteria on toilet surfaces.It removes tough stains and fight odours with its refreshing and superior lavender fresh fragrance. The innovative nozzle on Harpic Liquid Lavender Fresh encourage easy access to hard to reach spaces of the toilet bowl.
• 10x more limescale removal than ordinary bleaching powder or detergent powder
• Strong protection for your family
• Removes malodour to freshen your toilet
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Press the smooth sides of the cap and twist counter-clockwise to open
2. Squeeze gel arount the bowl and under the rim
3. Leave for 10 minutes, brush then flush
